message:
fix(web): default production builds to webpack and cap Next.js worker fanout to 1

Bun 1.3.12 repeatedly crashed with SIGILL after successful Next.js 16
Turbopack production builds on this high-core VPS. The teardown path of
Next/Turbopack under Bun trips an illegal-instruction in the Bun runtime
(https://bun.report/1.3.12/ln1700fc11i3Fq0ogC43ip6E+1vRss7wmD25qy5EA2Agt+E)
so repeated `bun run build` invocations would succeed at producing the
app output and then abort the process at exit, breaking CI and developer
flow.

Two coordinated mitigations in this commit:

1. `apps/web/package.json`
   - `build` and `build:isolated` now run `next build --webpack` so the
     production build uses the Webpack backend instead of Turbopack.
     Turbopack still remains available for `next dev`.
   - `build:isolated` and `type-check:isolated` now install an `EXIT`
     trap that deletes the per-scope `.tsconfig.next-<scope>.json` temp
     file they generate, so parallel agent runs stop leaving stale temp
     tsconfigs behind in the working tree.

2. `apps/web/next.config.ts`
   - Added a new `ACFS_NEXT_BUILD_CPUS` environment knob (positive integer,
     validated via regex + Number.isSafeInteger) that controls Next.js's
     static-generation worker count via `experimental.cpus`.
   - Default when unset is `1`. Next.js otherwise defaults to
     `os.cpus().length - 1`, which on a 128-thread host produced the
     worker fanout that reliably triggered the Bun SIGILL during build
     teardown. One worker is slower but stable.
   - Future revisits of Turbopack (once Bun/Next teardown is stable)
     are tracked under beads bd-elkig.

Context bead bd-0iiu5 also added to track the leftover
`apps/web/.tsconfig.next-*.json` artifacts from previous isolated-build
runs; the trap above fixes forward leakage but AGENTS.md forbids
deleting the existing files without explicit written permission.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -4,14 +4,14 @@
   "private": true,
   "scripts": {
     "dev": "next dev",
-    "build": "next build",
-    "build:isolated": "bash -lc 'export PATH=\"$PWD/node_modules/.bin:$PATH\"; scope=${ACFS_NEXT_DIST_SCOPE:-build-$PPID}; safe_scope=$(printf \"%s\" \"$scope\" | tr -cs \"[:alnum:]_-\" \"-\"); tsconfig=.tsconfig.next-${safe_scope}.json; cp tsconfig.json \"$tsconfig\"; export ACFS_NEXT_DIST_SCOPE=\"$scope\" ACFS_NEXT_TSCONFIG_PATH=\"$tsconfig\"; next build \"$@\"' --",
+    "build": "next build --webpack",
+    "build:isolated": "bash -lc 'export PATH=\"$PWD/node_modules/.bin:$PATH\"; scope=${ACFS_NEXT_DIST_SCOPE:-build-$PPID}; safe_scope=$(printf \"%s\" \"$scope\" | tr -cs \"[:alnum:]_-\" \"-\"); tsconfig=.tsconfig.next-${safe_scope}.json; trap \"rm -f -- \\\"$tsconfig\\\"\" EXIT; cp tsconfig.json \"$tsconfig\"; export ACFS_NEXT_DIST_SCOPE=\"$scope\" ACFS_NEXT_TSCONFIG_PATH=\"$tsconfig\"; next build --webpack \"$@\"' --",
     "start": "next start",
     "start:isolated": "bash -lc 'export PATH=\"$PWD/node_modules/.bin:$PATH\"; : \"${ACFS_NEXT_DIST_SCOPE:?Set ACFS_NEXT_DIST_SCOPE to the same value used for build}\"; next start \"$@\"' --",
     "lint": "eslint . --cache",
     "lint:isolated": "bash -lc 'export PATH=\"$PWD/node_modules/.bin:$PATH\"; scope=${ACFS_NEXT_DIST_SCOPE:-lint-$PPID}; safe_scope=$(printf \"%s\" \"$scope\" | tr -cs \"[:alnum:]_-\" \"-\"); eslint . --cache --cache-location \".eslintcache-${safe_scope}\" \"$@\"' --",
     "type-check": "bun run type-check:isolated",
-    "type-check:isolated": "bash -lc 'export PATH=\"$PWD/node_modules/.bin:$PATH\"; scope=${ACFS_NEXT_DIST_SCOPE:-typecheck-$PPID}; safe_scope=$(printf \"%s\" \"$scope\" | tr -cs \"[:alnum:]_-\" \"-\"); tsconfig=.tsconfig.next-${safe_scope}.json; cp tsconfig.json \"$tsconfig\"; export ACFS_NEXT_DIST_SCOPE=\"$scope\" ACFS_NEXT_TSCONFIG_PATH=\"$tsconfig\"; next typegen && tsc -p \"$tsconfig\" --noEmit --incremental false'",
+    "type-check:isolated": "bash -lc 'export PATH=\"$PWD/node_modules/.bin:$PATH\"; scope=${ACFS_NEXT_DIST_SCOPE:-typecheck-$PPID}; safe_scope=$(printf \"%s\" \"$scope\" | tr -cs \"[:alnum:]_-\" \"-\"); tsconfig=.tsconfig.next-${safe_scope}.json; trap \"rm -f -- \\\"$tsconfig\\\"\" EXIT; cp tsconfig.json \"$tsconfig\"; export ACFS_NEXT_DIST_SCOPE=\"$scope\" ACFS_NEXT_TSCONFIG_PATH=\"$tsconfig\"; next typegen && tsc -p \"$tsconfig\" --noEmit --incremental false'",
     "verify:isolated": "bash -lc 'scope=${ACFS_NEXT_DIST_SCOPE:-verify-$PPID}; export ACFS_NEXT_DIST_SCOPE=\"$scope\"; bun run type-check:isolated && bun run lint:isolated && bun run build:isolated'",
     "test:unit": "bun test lib components",
     "test": "playwright test",
